blended.narrative: Sunday River is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours with little to no accumulation. The 14-day outlook shows 11 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Tomorrow: light freezing rain, highs of 45°F.
Saturday: 4" of snow, highs of 31°F. Expect variable conditions.
Monday: 3.0" of snow, highs of 32°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
